live_documentation.update_frequency: Every build, push, and local build entry point
live_documentation.purpose: ALWAYS check Wiki for current tasks, research patterns, artifacts, and build logs
live_documentation.primary_source: Wiki pages reflect latest state - use for current/new tasks
live_documentation.static_source: This knowledge graph is snapshot - refer to Wiki for updates

artifact_locations.update_mechanism: Automatic via tools/log-to-bootstrap.sh on every build

core_concepts.bootc: OCI image → bootable OS, atomic updates, composefs backend
core_concepts.self_building: Podman + Buildah + bootc in-image, v1.x builds v1.(x+1)
core_concepts.multi_surface: WSL2, Hyper-V, bare metal, k3s nodes from single OCI image
core_concepts.security: SELinux enforcing, fapolicyd, CrowdSec, composefs verification

key_files.index: INDEX.md (AI agent hub, laws, directory map)
key_files.self_build: SELF-BUILD.md (4 build modes: CI/CD, Windows, Linux, self-build)

immutable_laws: USR-OVER-ETC: No static config in /etc/ at build time, use /usr/lib/
NO-MKDIR-IN-VAR: All /var dirs via tmpfiles.d, never mkdir in Containerfile
MANAGED-SELINUX: semodule -i in RUN layer, or stage in /usr/share/selinux/
BOOTC-CONTAINER-LINT: Mandatory final validation, enforces kernel hygiene

build_pipeline.outputs: OCI image → rechunk → RAW/ISO/VHDX/WSL via bootc-image-builder

version_history.MiOS-2: v0.1.x, ucore-hci base, pre-signed NVIDIA kmods
version_history.MiOS-NXT: Future: Hummingbird, SBOM, ARM64, minimal variants

mios_nxt_roadmap.hummingbird: Zero-CVE minimal base from Red Hat/Fedora
mios_nxt_roadmap.sbom: CycloneDX + SPDX via Syft, EU CRA compliance
mios_nxt_roadmap.arm64: Raspberry Pi 5, AWS Graviton, cross-arch builds

security_hardening.image: cosign keyless signing via GitHub OIDC

integration_points.k3s: SELinux policies, automated install via automation/13-ceph-k3s.sh
integration_points.vfio: GPU passthrough for VMs, 34-gpu-detect.sh gates NVIDIA on bare metal
integration_points.flatpak: Desktop apps isolation, install list in .env.mios

critical_decisions: OSTree backend (not composefs-native) for rollback capability
FOSS AI API agnostic (Ollama, llama.cpp, LocalAI, vLLM)
XZ primary compression (37% better than GZ)
Wiki as live documentation (auto-sync on builds)
lessons_learned: Pipefail pitfalls with ls/glob in strict bash
Secret masking requires special char escaping
composefs-native immature (no rollback as of v1.15.x)
